item.title: 6 Stats to Encourage Mentorship, Collaboration, and Innovation at Education Events
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: In a time of educator uncertainty and policy shifts, discover how mentorship, collaboration, and innovation can transform your next education event into a support, growth, and connection hub.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
In an increasingly unsettled policy landscape—where governance shifts and polarized debates around teaching have eroded confidence—educators are craving connection, stability, and practical support more than ever.

Your next education event can answer that call by focusing on mentorship, collaboration, and innovation. These insights and expertly curated data dive deep into issues driven by an aging teacher workforce, waning candidate pools, and education funding gaps.

Your next education conference undoubtedly presents pressing challenges; it also offers powerful opportunities to foster a vibrant, collaborative community.
Mentorship, collaboration, and innovation can transform education events into hubs for support, growth, and connection.
How mentorship and innovation elevate education events.
6 Stats That Drive Engagement at Education Events

item.title: Strategies to build a strong data governance policy
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Top tips for organizations to improve data quality and reduce risk.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Build a Strong Data Governance Policy | Momentive Software
Want to take control of your organization’s data? Read our infographic for seven steps to build your data governance policy.

Top tips for organizations to improve data quality and reduce risk.

Are you ready to take control of your organization’s data? Began building your data governance policy today by reading our infographic.
Infographic: 7 steps to build a strong data governance policy

item.title: 5 Ways Your Accounting Team Can Save Time
item.dc:creator: dev@500designs.com
item.excerpt:encoded: To help your accounting team save time and boost efficiency, download this infographic and discover five key strategies, including how to standardize reporting, consolidate systems, and automate manual processes.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Download an infographic with five strategies to save accounting time, standardize reporting, consolidate systems, and automate processes.
In today’s challenging environment, nonprofit accounting teams are being asked to do more with less. Discover five ways to maximize your team’s time and boost efficiency.

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:47:"Standardize reporting to avoid costly rework ";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:50:"Consolidate HR, payroll, and accounting systems ";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:59:"Automate manual processes and save up to 15 hours a week ";}s:6:"item-3";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:10:"And more! ";}}
Download the infographic now and start working more efficiently.
Infographics: 5 Time-Saving Tips for Accounting Teams
Infographic: 5 ways to save time in nonprofit accounting
5 Ways Accounting Teams Can Save Time

item.title: How to Keep Your Association's Volunteers Happy
item.dc:creator: soniya.bajoria@communitybrands.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Take your association’s volunteer program up a notch with the five ideas in this infographic.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: How to Keep Your Association's Volunteers Happy
Take your association’s volunteer program to the next level with this infographic sharing five ideas to keep your volunteers happy and engaged into the future.

Next-level tips for your volunteer program

At NetForum, we know volunteers. They are the backbone of most associations and as part of Momentive Software, we celebrate volunteers through initiatives like the IMPACT Project (and Awards) Honoring Volunteers. We hope this infographic will help inspire you with ideas to take your volunteer program to the next level so your association can continue to grow.

item.title: 4 Silent Auction Facts to Start a Bidding War
item.dc:creator: meera.parmar@momentivestg.wpenginepowered.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Discover 4 silent auction facts from 521K+ data points that reveal which items drive bidding wars and boost fundraising success.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: [Infographic] Silent Auction Facts That Spark Bidding Wars
Discover 4 silent auction facts from 521K+ data points that reveal which items drive bidding wars and boost fundraising success.

Auctions are a lot of work. Are they still worth it? Knowing which auction items could start a bidding war can make all of the difference in your success!

We’ve got that info for you – and then some! GiveSmart analyzed over 521,600 lines of silent and live auction data from nearly 4,300 organizations. From this data, we’ve learned which items can make a big impact at your auction.

We’re serving you just a snapshot here. Fill out the form to the right to see the data!

Auctions can still make a big impact on your mission. We have many more insights to share in November of 2025!

a:5:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:212:"Blog | 5 Ways to Use Silent Auction Data for Successful Fundraising";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:168:"Blog | 30 Best Silent Auction Ideas That Don’t Cost A Dime";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:175:"Guide | The Ultimate Data-Driven Auction Fundraising Guide";}s:6:"item-3";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:127:"Webinar | Let the Bidding War Begin";}s:6:"item-4";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:236:"Webinar | Beyond Bids: Best Practices and Proven Strategies to Perfecting the Live Auction";}}

<script charset="utf-8" type="text/javascript" src="//js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js"></script>
<script>

  });
</script>

item.title: 9 Stats that Prove Why You Should Implement Recurring Giving
item.dc:creator: soniya.bajoria@communitybrands.com

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Recurring Giving Stats: Why Monthly Donors Matter
Discover why nonprofits should prioritize recurring giving. 9 stats on donor lifespan, revenue impact, and stewardship tips.

Recurring giving isn’t just a trend — it’s a proven strategy for building sustainable, long-term support. The powerful stats in this infographic highlight why nonprofits should prioritize recurring giving donations to drive more revenue with less effort.

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:54:"Tips for inspiring and stewarding new monthly donors ";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:54:"The number of years recurring donors continue to give ";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:64:"How GiveSmart monthly donors compare to overall giving averages ";}s:6:"item-3";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:10:"And more! ";}}

Implementing recurring giving is one of the smartest moves your nonprofit can make. It drives consistent revenue, deepens donor loyalty, and creates a reliable foundation for your mission — all with minimal effort.

item.title: 6 Stats to Help Nonprofits Navigate Economic Instability
item.dc:creator: meera.parmar@momentivestg.wpenginepowered.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Explore proven economic resilience strategies designed to help nonprofits diversify revenue, strengthen donor relationships, & build long-term financial stability.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Economic Resilience Strategies for Nonprofit Organizations
Explore proven economic resilience strategies designed to help nonprofits diversify revenue, strengthen donor relationships, & build long-term financial stability.

Economic uncertainty doesn't pause for the work you do,  and neither should your fundraising strategy. 

Whether you're navigating shifting donor behavior, mourning the loss of a revenue stream, or simply looking for smarter ways to grow, this infographic provides the data-backed insights you need to move forward with confidence.

a:5:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:65:"The #1 revenue stream nonprofits are prioritizing right now
";}s:6:"item-4";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:99:"Why recurring donors are worth 5.4x more than one-time givers — and how to get more of them
";}s:6:"item-3";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:84:"The fundraising platform features most nonprofits aren't using (but should be)
";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:75:"What the AmazonSmile shutdown taught us about revenue diversification
";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:114:"How Donor Advised Funds have grown 4x in a decade, and why 68% of nonprofits are still leaving them on the table ";}}
As you consider these insights, remember: The nonprofits that thrive during hard times aren't the ones with the biggest budgets. They're the ones with the most adaptable strategies.

<script charset="utf-8" type="text/javascript" src="//js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js"></script>
<script>
  hbspt.forms.create({
    portalId: "46621835",
    formId: "f4ab626c-42b0-44c2-be0a-be9954a741c8",
    region: "na1"
  });
</script>

item.title: 5 Stats to Boost Year-End Appeals
item.dc:creator: meera.parmar@momentivestg.wpenginepowered.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Discover year-end appeal strategies that help nonprofits craft compelling asks, boost donor response rates, and hit revenue goals before December 31.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Year-End Appeal Strategies to Close More Gifts in Q4
Discover year-end appeal strategies that help nonprofits craft compelling asks, boost donor response rates, and hit revenue goals before December 31.

Year-end giving is crucial for nonprofits, but success requires more than just an e-mail. You need a strategy based on real donor behavior.  

This free infographic breaks down five stats that reveal key year-end trends: when donors are most likely to give, how much they contribute, and which messaging motivates them to act.  

Whether this is your first or fifteenth year-end campaign, these insights will help you make smarter asks, build stronger connections, and increase donations.

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:46:"The best times to send your year-end asks
";}s:6:"item-3";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:63:"Messaging that actually resonates during the giving season
";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:70:"How to turn November and December first-timers into repeat donors
";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:56:"Benchmarks to set goals that are realistic and ambitious";}}

item.title: 4 Strategies to Help Attract New Donors
item.dc:creator: soniya.bajoria@communitybrands.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Discover donor acquisition strategies that help nonprofits attract new supporters, grow their donor base, & build a stronger fundraising pipeline.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Donor Acquisition Strategies That Grow Your Donor Base
Discover donor acquisition strategies that help nonprofits attract new supporters, grow their donor base, & build a stronger fundraising pipeline.

Finding new donors isn't only about casting a wider net. It's about showing up in the right places, making giving easy, and building the kind of trust that turns first-time donors into lifelong supporters.  

This free guide breaks down four practical strategies to help your nonprofit attract and influence new donors, whether you're growing your online presence, tightening up your donor experience, or tapping into the power of your existing community.

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:86:"Where your potential donors are actually spending their time, and how to reach them. ";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:98:"Why donor security concerns are costing nonprofits contributions, and what you can do about it. ";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:92:"The friction points that make giving feel frustrating, and simple fixes that remove them. ";}s:6:"item-3";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:70:"How peer-to-peer fundraising can put donor acquisition on autopilot. ";}}
There's room to grow your donor base, and this infographic shares how. Download it today.

<script charset="utf-8" type="text/javascript" src="//js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js"></script>
<script>

  });

item.title: 6 Ways to Increase Revenue During Your Next Fundraising Event
item.dc:creator: soniya.bajoria@communitybrands.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Find event revenue strategies built for nonprofits ready to grow income, increase donor spend, & consistently raise more with every event they run.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Event Revenue Strategies That Maximize Fundraising Results
Find event revenue strategies built for nonprofits ready to grow income, increase donor spend, & consistently raise more with every event they run.

Planning a fundraising event takes a lot: coordinating logistics, promoting the event, selling tickets, and getting supporters in the door. 

But once your event begins, how do you make the most of the moment? 

With the right strategies in place, you can turn engagement into impact and raise more without adding complexity.

a:5:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:76:"Tips for creating an emotional connection that inspires giving in real-time ";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:71:"Ideas for small upgrades you can make to your silent and live auctions ";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:95:"Creative revenue enhancers like games, raffles, and sales that make it easy for people to give ";}s:6:"item-3";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:70:"Mission-attached giving opportunities that clearly show donor impact ";}s:6:"item-4";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:10:"And more! ";}}
Whether you’re hosting a large annual gala or a smaller community event, the ideas in this infographic can help you raise more while creating a better experience for every attendee.

<script charset="utf-8" type="text/javascript" src="//js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js"></script>

item.title: 6 Stats Nonprofits Need for Successful Event Planning
item.dc:creator: soniya.bajoria@communitybrands.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Discover event planning ideas designed to increase donor turnout, grow giving, & help your nonprofit hit revenue goals every time.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Event Planning Ideas That Boost Donor Turnout & Revenue
Discover event planning ideas designed to increase donor turnout, grow giving, & help your nonprofit hit revenue goals every time.

Nonprofit event planning has changed a lot in the last few years. Our team has pulled together six data points that help your organization make smarter decisions before, during, and after your next event.
In this infographic, you’ll find that:

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:122:"Timing is everything. Many organizations sell tickets at least 30 days out. Are you giving yourself enough runway? ";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:145:"Your donors want options. Most fundraising professionals say offering multiple ways to give directly helps them hit their revenue goals. ";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:163:"The donation experience matters more than you think. Nearly a third of fundraising professionals say their donors would describe giving as time-consuming. ";}s:6:"item-3";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:134:"And yes — ticket prices are going up. Donors are still showing up and paying more. Here's what that means for your strategy. ";}}
Use these six stats to inform your event strategy and make every fundraising moment count.

<script charset="utf-8" type="text/javascript" src="//js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js"></script>
<script>

    region: "na1",

  });
</script>

item.title: 6 Insights to Inspire Diversifying Revenue Streams
item.dc:creator: meera.parmar@momentivestg.wpenginepowered.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Explore how nonprofits diversify revenue streams with grants, events, memberships, & more. See key stats & ideas in this easy infographic.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Explore how nonprofits diversify revenue streams with grants, events, memberships, & more. See key stats & ideas in this easy infographic.

Amidst rapidly shifting economic conditions and federal funding freezes, increasing revenue should be a key priority for nonprofits in 2025.  

By leveraging a variety of nonprofit revenue streams, organizations can not only meet immediate fiscal challenges but also position themselves for long-term financial growth.  

These insights and expertly curated data in this infographic offer a comprehensive look at the most-used funding streams, strategies you should consider, innovative funding approaches, and more to fuel your mission and programs.  

Nonprofits must adopt a strategic, multifaceted approach to revenue generation. By focusing on scalable fundraising plans, organizations can not only meet immediate fiscal challenges but also secure long-term financial stability.

item.title: 5 Stats for #GivingTuesday Growth
item.dc:creator: soniya.bajoria@communitybrands.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Explore the latest Giving Tuesday statistics in this easy-to-share infographic. See donation trends, donor behavior, & key insights for nonprofits.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Giving Tuesday Statistics You Need to Know
Explore the latest Giving Tuesday statistics in this easy-to-share infographic. See donation trends, donor behavior, & key insights for nonprofits.

Mark your calendars: #GivingTuesday 2025 falls on December 2. With an estimated $3.74 billion projected to be raised this year, organizations can leverage this global day of giving to experiment with fresh fundraising strategies—and attract new supporters in the process.

This infographic offers stats to influence your #GivingTuesday communication, strategy, and plans.

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:86:"Diverse forms of #GivingTuesday support including volunteerism and goods and services ";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:38:"Why recurring giving really pays off ";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:65:"Ideal timing for sending #GivingTuesday e-mails and social posts ";}s:6:"item-3";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:10:"And more! ";}}

item.title: 5 Stats to Unlock Giving by Generation
item.dc:creator: meera.parmar@momentivestg.wpenginepowered.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Our team has compiled data from GiveSmart’s comprehensive, expanding feature set to give nonprofit organizations an inside look into recurring giving, a growing revenue stream for nonprofits.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value: Our team has compiled data from GiveSmart’s comprehensive, expanding feature set to give nonprofit organizations an inside look into recurring giving, a growing revenue stream for nonprofits.

Donors are still giving, no matter the generation. They’re actually giving more.

What’s behind these trends, and how can your organization harness this period of generosity and pending wealth transfer? How can these insights improve your donor relationships and bring on better outcomes for those you serve?

a:4:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:35:"Growth trends by generation ";}s:6:"item-3";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:81:"Standout stats on each generation, to influence how you communicate with them ";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:53:"Impulse giving by generation (and why it matters) ";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:11:"And more! ";}}

Consider what you can do to encourage generosity across generations. By sharing more about your mission regularly and making it easy to give, you can encourage continued giving across generations.

Additional Giving Resources:  

  • Template | Recurring Giving Appeal Templates
  • Webinar | From Boomers to Gen Z: Giving Trends by Generation
  • Webinar | Decoding Donors: Unpacking Donor Psychology and Mastering Outreach to Engage Every Generation

<script charset="utf-8" type="text/javascript" src="//js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js"></script>
<script>
  hbspt.forms.create({
    portalId: "46621835",
    formId: "52afdfbf-a05a-4350-9944-e057756f266a",
    region: "na1",
    sfdcCampaignId: "701Ph00000sRb9PIAS"
  });
</script>

item.title: 7 Ways to Prevent Association Staff Burnout
item.dc:creator: soniya.bajoria@communitybrands.com
item.excerpt:encoded: Download the infographic to learn 7 practical ways associations can reduce staff burnout, improve retention, and fix systems that drain teams.

wp:postmeta.wp:meta_value:
Most associations don't have a burnout problem. They have a systems problem. 

Disconnected tools, repetitive tasks, and constant demands are draining your team and putting retention at risk.  

It doesn’t have to be this way. Stop burnout before it gets out of hand. Fixing underlying systems lets your staff focus on meaningful, mission-critical work. 

We mapped insights from Momentive's 2026 Talent Retention Report to the specific moments where associations actually lose staff. The day-to-day friction that's easy to miss until someone puts in their notice.

a:3:{s:6:"item-0";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:66:"Where manual work is quietly draining your team's time and energy ";}s:6:"item-1";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:69:"Which changes can you make now, before burnout becomes a resignation ";}s:6:"item-2";a:1:{s:11:"description";s:69:"What you can change now, without rebuilding your systems from scratch";}}

<script charset="utf-8" type="text/javascript" src="//js.hsforms.net/forms/embed/v2.js"></script>
<script>
  hbspt.forms.create({
    portalId: "46621835",
    formId: "71c42d85-00b8-4445-b95d-f246f3c828b8",
    region: "na1",
    sfdcCampaignId: "701Ph00001D9Ho1IAF"
  });
</script>
